sections.paragraph:
Original: גּזז

Transliteration: gâzêz

Phonetic: gaw-zaze'

BDB Definition:

Gazez = "shearer"
  1. a son of Caleb by his concubine Ephah
  2. a son of Haran, the son of Caleb by his concubine Ephah (?)

Origin: from H1494

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
